summary: Tested Geofencing and False Arrival Report features for seller protection. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend UI shows 'السائق لم يصل فعلياً؟' button for orders with driver_arrived_at in ready status.

geofencing_arrived_endpoint.details: Endpoint accepts latitude/longitude as query params. Implements Haversine formula for distance calculation. MAX_DISTANCE_METERS = 300

geofencing_distance_validation.details: Backend validates driver location against store coordinates. Rejects arrival if distance > 300 meters with clear Arabic error message

report_false_arrival_endpoint.details: Only accessible by store owner (food_seller). Cancels driver_arrived_at, sets false_arrival_reported=True, creates complaint in driver_complaints collection

driver_complaints_system.details: Complaints stored in driver_complaints collection. Tracks driver_id, store_id, order_id, type='false_arrival', reason, location data, status

penalty_system.details: Driver false_arrival_complaints counter incremented. At 5 complaints, driver suspended for 24 hours via delivery_documents.suspended_until

frontend_driver_arrived_button.details: handleDriverArrival function uses navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition to get driver's location before calling arrived endpoint

frontend_report_false_arrival_button.details: Button 'السائق لم يصل فعلياً؟' appears when: order.status='ready' AND order.driver_arrived_at AND !order.pickup_code_verified. Tested click action - shows success toast

arrived_endpoint.with_location: Returns success if within 300m of store
arrived_endpoint.far_location: Returns 400 error: 'يجب أن تكون قرب المتجر لتسجيل الوصول'

success_response.message: تم تسجيل الشكوى وإلغاء عداد الانتظار

critical_code_review_comments: Haversine formula implementation in food_orders.py is correct for calculating distance in meters
Geofencing constant MAX_DISTANCE_METERS = 300 is properly defined at line 1555
Frontend correctly uses Geolocation API with enableHighAccuracy and proper error handling
Penalty system correctly suspends driver after 5 complaints for 24 hours
seed_data_creation: Updated order food_f21b022d to status='ready' with driver_arrived_at to test report false arrival UI
context_for_next_testing_agent: Geofencing and False Arrival Report system fully implemented and tested. Driver complaints are tracked in driver_complaints collection. Penalty system applies 24h suspension after 5 complaints.
verification_notes: Tested report false arrival button click - Toast showed 'تم الإبلاغ' with 'تم إلغاء عداد الانتظار وتسجيل الشكوى'
Verified driver_complaints collection has complaint entry with type='false_arrival'
Verified order.driver_arrived_at set to None after report
